allow: Bash(node -e "const {PrismaClient} = require\(''./node_modules/.prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.siteConfig.findFirst\(\).then\(r => { console.log\(''DB OK:'', JSON.stringify\(r\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(''DB ERROR:'', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
